intro.speaker: Caller
intro.text: Strange lights in the sky, Vern. Three of them, moving in formation.

development.speaker: Caller
development.text: They were too fast. And they changed direction instantly.

Skeptical.speaker: Vern
Skeptical.text: Sounds like drones. Kids fly them all the time now.

Skeptical.speaker: Caller
Skeptical.text: Maybe. But they were really high up.

Believing.speaker: Vern
Believing.text: Instant direction changes. That rules out conventional aircraft.

conclusion.speaker: Vern
conclusion.text: Keep watching the skies. Thanks for calling.

intro.speaker: Caller
intro.text: Saw some weird lights last night. Thought you should know.

development.speaker: Caller
development.text: Orange, pulsing. Moved around, then just disappeared.

Skeptical.speaker: Vern
Skeptical.text: Chinese lanterns do that exact thing.

Skeptical.speaker: Caller
Skeptical.text: Could be. Didn't think of that.

intro.speaker: Caller
intro.text: Lights in the sky, Vern. Not planes, not stars. Something else.

development.speaker: Caller
development.text: Erratic. Zigzagging. Then they merged into one light and shot straight up.

Skeptical.speaker: Vern
Skeptical.text: Could be military flares or training exercises.

Skeptical.speaker: Caller
Skeptical.text: Possible. There is a base nearby.

Believing.speaker: Vern
Believing.text: Merging lights. That's been reported before in major sightings.

conclusion.speaker: Vern
conclusion.text: Note the time and location. Might be worth investigating.

conclusion.speaker: Caller
conclusion.text: I wrote it all down. Thanks, Vern.

intro.speaker: Vern
intro.text: {callerName} from {callerLocation}, tell me about these lights.

intro.speaker: Caller
intro.text: Three lights, Vern. Hovering over the lake. Silent.

development.speaker: Caller
development.text: Maybe five minutes. Then they flew off in different directions simultaneously.

Skeptical.speaker: Vern
Skeptical.text: Coordinated movement suggests human control. Drone show maybe?

Skeptical.speaker: Caller
Skeptical.text: At 2 AM over a lake? Seems unlikely.

Believing.speaker: Vern
Believing.text: Simultaneous departure in different directions. Interesting.

Believing.speaker: Caller
Believing.text: It was like they were done observing and just left.

conclusion.speaker: Vern
conclusion.text: Good observation. Let us know if you see them again.

intro.speaker: Caller
intro.text: Yes! Three of them! They were just HOVERING there!

development.speaker: Caller
development.text: Minutes! Then they shot off in three different directions at once!

Skeptical.speaker: Vern
Skeptical.text: Could still be drones - they can do that now!

Skeptical.speaker: Caller
Skeptical.text: Maybe, but these were BIG, Vern!

Believing.speaker: Vern
Believing.text: Three directions at once! Coordinated but not human!

conclusion.speaker: Vern
conclusion.text: Keep your phone ready next time! We need footage!

conclusion.speaker: Caller
conclusion.text: Already set up a camera! Thanks, Vern!
